description: Dry-run fixture v2 — triggers the archive-previous-project flow after v1 has been run. Different branchName forces the agent to archive v1's Crow Memory entries and copy prd.json + progress.txt into archive/.

userStories.title: Append LINE-C to TARGET.md marker block
userStories.description: Between the marker delimiters in TARGET.md, append a new line: LINE-C. Older content from the v1 run may or may not be present — do not rely on it.
acceptanceCriteria: TARGET.md contains the literal string 'LINE-C' inside the marker block
Marker delimiters remain intact and in order

userStories.title: Record v2 completion note in TARGET.md
userStories.description: Add a line inside the marker block: V2-RUN: passed.
acceptanceCriteria: Marker block contains exactly one 'V2-RUN: passed' line
